title: Post Office Recurring Deposit (Third Amendment) Rules, 1991.
description: Post Office Recurring Deposit (Third Amendment) Rules, 1991.

(D.N.) 127 The Gazette of INDIA EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 329] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 12,1991/BHADRA 21, 1913 Separate Paging is given to this Part fat order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 2359GI/91 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATIONS New Delhi, the 12th September, 1991 G.S.R. 579(E):—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following ruks farther to amsad tbe Post OJkc Recurring Deposit Rules, 1981. namely ; - 1. (1) These rules may bo called the Post Office Recurring Deposit (Third Amendment) Rules, 1991. (2) They shall come into force on the 1st day of October, 1991. 2.
